member.name: T:FSBS.Api.Auth.CurrentUserService
member.summary: Reads the current user's identity from the active HTTP request's JWT claims. Registered as a scoped service so each request gets its own instance.

remarks.para: The sub claim is the Cognito user sub GUID. In a full implementation FsbsClaimsTransformation would resolve this to the application's own AppUser.Id and add it as a separate claim. Until that transform is in place, UserId returns the Cognito sub parsed as a GUID.

Unauthenticated requests (e.g. the public registration endpoints) return Guid.Empty / false without throwing, allowing FsbsDbContext to be resolved from DI even when no user is logged in. The audit interceptor skips stamping CreatedBy/UpdatedBy when is Guid.Empty.

member.name: M:FSBS.Api.Auth.CurrentUserService.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IHttpContextAccessor)
member.summary: Reads the current user's identity from the active HTTP request's JWT claims. Registered as a scoped service so each request gets its own instance.

remarks.para: The sub claim is the Cognito user sub GUID. In a full implementation FsbsClaimsTransformation would resolve this to the application's own AppUser.Id and add it as a separate claim. Until that transform is in place, UserId returns the Cognito sub parsed as a GUID.

Unauthenticated requests (e.g. the public registration endpoints) return Guid.Empty / false without throwing, allowing FsbsDbContext to be resolved from DI even when no user is logged in. The audit interceptor skips stamping CreatedBy/UpdatedBy when is Guid.Empty.

member.name: T:FSBS.Api.Auth.FsbsClaimsTransformation
member.summary: Normalises claims from either Cognito pool's JWT into a unified set of application claims that the rest of the API can rely on regardless of which pool (Staff or Customer) issued the token.

remarks.para: Both pools emit app_role and tenant_id as custom Cognito attributes. The Staff pool additionally emits custom:entra_groups (used only by the Token Refresh Lambda; not consumed here). The Customer pool emits org_id for CorporateManager and CorporateStudent roles.
This transform is idempotent — if the normalised claims are already present (e.g. on a second call within the same request) they are not duplicated.

member.name: M:FSBS.Api.Auth.FsbsClaimsTransformation.NormaliseAppRole(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal,System.Security.Claims.ClaimsIdentity)
member.summary: Ensures a canonical app_role claim is present and that the value is a valid enum member. Falls back to when the claim is absent or unrecognised (e.g. a Customer pool token with no explicit role set).

member.name: M:FSBS.Api.Auth.FsbsClaimsTransformation.NormaliseTenantId(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal,System.Security.Claims.ClaimsIdentity)
member.summary: Ensures a canonical tenant_id claim is present. Staff tokens always carry the school's root tenant GUID. Customer tokens carry the customer's own tenant GUID.

member.name: M:FSBS.Api.Auth.FsbsClaimsTransformation.NormaliseOrgId(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal,System.Security.Claims.ClaimsIdentity)
member.summary: Ensures a canonical org_id claim is present when the token carries one. Only CorporateManager and CorporateStudent tokens include this attribute; it is absent for Staff and PrivateCustomer tokens.

member.name: M:FSBS.Api.Auth.FsbsClaimsTransformation.FindFirstValue(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal,System.String[])
member.summary: Returns the first non-null value found for any of the supplied claim type names, or null if none are present.

member.name: M:FSBS.Api.Endpoints.BookingEndpoints.PushAvailabilityUpdateAsync(System.Guid,FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.IAvailabilityCache,FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.IAvailabilityReadService,Microsoft.AspNetCore.SignalR.IHubContext{FSBS.Api.Hubs.AvailabilityHub},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Invalidates the Redis availability cache for the simulator and pushes a fresh grid to all SignalR clients subscribed to that simulator.

member.name: T:FSBS.Api.Endpoints.CreateBookingRequest
member.summary: Request body for POST /bookings.

member.name: M:FSBS.Api.Endpoints.CreateBookingRequest.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid,FSBS.Domain.Enums.TrainingType,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String,System.String)

member.name: T:FSBS.Api.Endpoints.DevEndpoints
member.summary: Development-only endpoints. All return 404 unless the application is running in the Development environment. Never deploy with ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development in production.

member.name: T:FSBS.Api.Hubs.AvailabilityHub
member.summary: SignalR hub that pushes real-time availability delta messages to all connected clients whenever a booking is created, modified, or cancelled.

remarks.para: Clients subscribe to a simulator's availability stream by calling SubscribeToSimulator(simulatorId) after connecting. They are placed in a SignalR group named simulator:{simulatorId} and receive AvailabilityUpdated messages whenever that simulator's grid changes.
The Redis (ElastiCache) backplane is configured in Program.cs so that messages are fanned out across all Fargate task instances.
The hub requires an authenticated user — the default authorization policy (Staff or Customer JWT) applies.

member.name: M:FSBS.Api.Hubs.AvailabilityHub.SubscribeToSimulator(System.Guid)
member.summary: Called by the client to start receiving availability updates for a specific simulator. The client is added to the group simulator:{simulatorId}.

member.name: M:FSBS.Api.Hubs.AvailabilityHub.UnsubscribeFromSimulator(System.Guid)
member.summary: Called by the client to stop receiving updates for a simulator.

member.name: M:FSBS.Api.Hubs.AvailabilityHub.SendAvailabilityUpdatedAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.SignalR.IHubContext{FSBS.Api.Hubs.AvailabilityHub},System.Guid,FSBS.Application.Simulators.Queries.AvailabilityGridDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
T:FSBS.Api.Middleware.GlobalExceptionHandler
member.summary: Translates domain and validation exceptions into RFC 7807 Problem Details responses. Registered via app.UseExceptionHandler().
member.remarks:
Mapping table:
422 Unprocessable Entity — field-level errors
409 Conflict
400 Bad Request
400 Bad Request
All others500 Internal Server Error (detail suppressed)

member.name: M:FSBS.Api.Middleware.GlobalExceptionHandler.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FSBS.Api.Middleware.GlobalExceptionHandler})
member.summary: Translates domain and validation exceptions into RFC 7807 Problem Details responses. Registered via app.UseExceptionHandler().
member.remarks:
Mapping table:
422 Unprocessable Entity — field-level errors
409 Conflict
400 Bad Request
400 Bad Request
All others500 Internal Server Error (detail suppressed)

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
